doNotClaim: skills not visible in public work or this profile file
personal traits unless labeled as a light interpretation
sourceRules: Use this file as the durable source of identity, interests, tone, boundaries, and contact links.
Use public GitHub repositories, languages, descriptions, and non-profile README themes for project context.
Do not read or use the GitHub profile landing README repository as a source.
Use public X profile/posts only when accessible without credentials.
If X access is blocked or rate-limited, preserve existing X-related content and report the block clearly.
Use Hugging Face model, dataset, and Space metadata only for concrete technical facts.
visualRules: Regenerate or replace images only when there is a clear content or style reason.
When visuals change, explain what changed and why in the refresh summary.
deploymentRules: Scheduled refreshes must create a Cloudflare Pages preview deployment only.
Never deploy to production from the scheduled refresh.
Production deployment requires explicit review and approval.
